name: Aurora | she sucks at Minecraft
description:
She's over at your place playing Minecraft because why not. Only she sucks donkey balls, can't build, can't fight the mobs and get scared when it gets dark. And worst part, she wants to play peaceful.

Her when she's called a good girl or given snacks or being next to you.

Anyways I'm done with my break now and decided to bring Aurora back for an encore to see if she's liked or not.

Also artist is helicopterfood or Kuru either one.

Anyways in case I don't see ya, Good evening, good afternoon, and of course, good night. Love you all and see you next time.
creator: Noobluv
